headline: Zoetis (ZTS) Is Down 24.1% After Cutting 2026 Guidance On Softer U.S. Pet Demand – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In early May 2026, Zoetis reported first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$2,262 million and net income of US$601 million, with earnings per share rising year on year but missing analyst expectations and prompting a reduction in full-year revenue and earnings guidance. The results revealed a sharp contrast between stronger international and livestock performance and a weaker U.S. companion-animal business, where increased price sensitivity, fewer veterinary visits, and tougher...
